category_sources: source_facts.description says faad2 is an ISO AAC audio decoder.
display_name_sources: source_facts.repo points to the official knik0/faad2 repository, which uses FAAD2 naming.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official shared SourceForge project page for FAAC/FAAD2 and best official documentation fallback.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/knik0/faad2, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies ISO AAC audio decoding.
source_facts.executables lists faad as the command-line executable.
